nchor\":\"\",\"function\":\"build_scheduler\",\"new\":\"\",\"old\":\"\",\"op\":\"replace_function\",\"source\":\"def build_scheduler(optimizer: optim.Optimizer, steps_per_epoch: int):\\n    if not USE_LR_SCHEDULE:\\n        return None\\n    total_steps = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else max(1, steps_per_epoch * 50)\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(\\n        optimizer,\\n        T_max=total_steps,\\n        eta_min=LEARNING_RATE * 0.05,\\n    )\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed-step budget more effectively by turning on a cosine LR schedule tied to the actual step cap, and pair it with AdamW plus a slightly stronger learning rate and decay.
